creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 179848
patch (svn diff) for sysutils/fusefs-chironfs

this pr(1) updates sysutils/fusefs-chironfs:

MASTERSITES - replace GOOGLE with reliable alternative
bumps PORTREVISION
MAINTAINER - replace ports@ with me
adds LICENSE
WWW

and for BONUS POINTS, I'm even attaching a build log. :)

That's pretty much it!

Please find the svn diff sysutils_fusefs-chironfs.diff
and the build log sysutils_fusefs-chironfs-QA-LOG
attached to this pr(1).

Thanks!

--Chris
